Praggnanandhaa R (2741) - Sindarov, Javokhir (2745) 
FIDE Candidates Tournament 2026 (Chess.com) [03] 2026.03.31
D37 Queen's Gambit Declined, classical variation (5.Bf4)

1.d4 d5 2.c4 e6 3.Nc3 Be7 4.Nf3 Nf6 5.Bf4 O-O 6.e3 c5 7.dxc5 Bxc5 8.a3 Nc6 9.Qc2 Re8 10.Bg5 d4 11.Bxf6 Qxf6 12.Ne4 Qf5 13.b4 Nxb4 14.axb4 Bxb4+ 15.Kd1 dxe3 16.Bd3 Qg6 17.fxe3 f5 18.Ng3 Bc5 19.Qc3 e5 20.Bc2 e4 21.Nd2 Rd8 22.Kc1 Qg5 23.Re1 Qe7 24.Re2 Bb4 25.Qb2 a5 26.Nb3 Ra6 27.Nd4 Qg5 28.Kb1 h5 29.Ka2 h4 30.Nf1 Bd7 31.Rd1 Rc8 32.Nd2 Rb6 33.c5 Rxc5 34.Qb3+ Kh8 35.Qf7 Rxc2+ 36.Kb1 Rxd2 37.Rdxd2 Bxd2+ 38.Ka2 Bxe3 39.Qxd7 Bxd4 40.Qxd4 Qf6
